notes: Production evidence for v0.4.0. Promotes v0.4.0-rc.1. All RC gates passed. Rotation rehearsal automated checks passed on enlogy@10.0.0.32 (api_health, query_body_fallback, primary_token_auth). No database migrations in v0.4.0 — schema unchanged from v0.3.5. Full v0.4.x competitive baseline shipped.

docker_compose_prod_smoke: PASSED — /health returned db:ok, /setup returned HTTP 200. enlogy@10.0.0.32, image managecallai-api:local tagged v0.4.0.

rotation_rehearsal.note: Full live secret rotation requires a production deployment with actual rotating secrets. The automated precondition checks (API reachable, token auth, no fallback path) all pass. JWT and runtime-token manual rotation steps are operator-performed during live deployments.

no_migrations: v0.4.0 includes no database schema changes. Upgrade from v0.3.5 requires no db:migrate step.
production_soak: Inherited from v0.3.0. No call-path or hot-path changes in v0.4.0.
carrier_interop: Inherited from v0.3.0 (docs/ops/carrier-interop-evidence-fusionpbx-2026-06-02.json). No call-path changes in v0.4.0.
security_review: CodeQL run 26981040863 clean. Emergency number block refactored to shared module — single non-bypassable source of truth. No new attack surface introduced.
rollback_plan: Roll back to v0.3.5 image. No data migration risk — no schema changes.

operator_signoff.notes: Production signoff for v0.4.0. All 7 v0.4.x competitive baseline buckets delivered and verified. All RC gates pass. Rotation rehearsal automated checks pass on enlogy@10.0.0.32.
